title: Married in Berdichev
body:
# Married in Berdichev

Denver-area band remixed by alphabets (Colin Ward) on **REMIX09** (December 30, 2009). Track: "FUNNEL CLOUDS [MARRIED IN BERDICHEV]."

Berdichev is a Ukrainian city, historically significant as a Jewish cultural center — the name may be a literary or historical allusion. No further online presence confirmed yet.

## Research Gaps

- Band members unknown
- Bandcamp / SoundCloud presence not confirmed
- Only known via REMIX09 track title

## Sources

- [alphabets REMIX09 — Bandcamp](https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/remix09)
